steps.title: Identify the conversion needed
steps.content: The object's speed is given as 64 yards per second, but we need to express it in feet per second. The conversion factor provided is 1 yard = 3 feet.

steps.title: Convert yards per second to feet per second
steps.content:
To convert yards to feet, multiply the speed by the conversion factor:
$$64 \text{ yards/s} \times 3 \text{ feet/yard} = 192 \text{ feet/s}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
